overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The player moves from a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway to a waterfront promenade with views of towering skyscrapers and industrial structures, then turns into a narrow industrial street.

events.description: silver sedan drives past from left to right on the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive green metal support columns and curved highway overpass
tall building with distinctive red and gold facade and digital 03 display near the top
wide pedestrian walkway with tiled pattern
multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic city. The street runs parallel on the left with occasional vehicles passing by, while a towering skyscraper with a digital 03 display dominates the distant skyline ahead.

events.description: emerging from under the overpass into open waterfront area with full sky visibility
camera tilts upward to view the top of the 03 skyscraper against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, pausing to look up at the towering skyscraper

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking along the waterfront path

entered.detail: concrete barrier with vertical posts separating walkway from water
wide river with murky green water reflecting the city

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a bright, open waterfront promenade. The camera moves along the water's edge with a concrete railing on the right, while pedestrians walk by. The view opens up to reveal the full height of the 03 skyscraper against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with large piping infrastructure

events.description: view shifts to industrial area with massive black pipes and red warning lights

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path past industrial structures and piping

entered.detail: massive black cylindrical pipes with red chevron warning lights running along the top
metal walkways and platforms attached to industrial buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking past industrial infrastructure along the waterfront. Massive black pipes with red warning lights run along the left side, while the water remains visible to the right. The area is devoid of pedestrians, creating an isolated industrial atmosphere beneath the elevated highway.

events.description: turning left away from waterfront into narrow street between industrial buildings
continuing straight toward intersection with traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the industrial street toward the intersection, passing parked vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange cap and blue jacket walking ahead toward the intersection
police officer standing near parked police car

entered.detail: dark metal warehouse structures with corrugated walls and loading docks
vintage blue and white sedans parked along the left curb
black and white police car parked on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the waterfront into a narrow industrial street flanked by warehouses and parked vehicles. The elevated highway now passes directly overhead, casting shadows on the asphalt. Pedestrians walk ahead toward a distant intersection where a traffic light is visible, while a police officer stands near a parked cruiser on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of an urban overpass to a bright waterfront promenade and back into a narrow industrial corridor. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, moving toward a distant skyscraper marked with a digital 03 display. As the camera emerges from under the overpass, the scene opens into a sunlit waterfront promenade where pedestrians stroll along a concrete railing under a partly cloudy sky. The view then shifts toward a more isolated atmosphere as the camera passes massive black pipes with red warning lights, before turning away from the water and into a narrow industrial street. Finally, the camera moves beneath the overhead highway again, passing parked vehicles and a police officer standing by a cruiser toward a distant intersection.
